final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing sports action illustration of a basketball player dunking mid-air on a basketball court (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 热血 shounen sports anime aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a dynamic mid-air dunk as the focal point, with motion blur applied to convey speed and tension
Subject: must include the basketball player airborne in a slam dunk, sweat droplets flying off the body
Scene/backdrop: must include a basketball court with a cheering crowd and camera flashlights in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tension, passionate atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vivid, high-energy direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn anime linework feel with dynamic motion-blur treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve dynamic motion blur effect and sense of explosive tension throughout the composition
Avoid: static or flat poses; muted or low-energy color treatment
